title: coleus klossii
intro: Coleus klossii is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as a type of coleus. Traditionally, Coleus klossii has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Coleus klossii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, Coleus klossii is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
